name: Sesame Vegetable Rice
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Thinly sliced mixed vegetables (whatever's available -- carrots, celery, broccoli, squash, cabbage, beans, mushrooms)
recipeInstructions:
1. When the rice is almost ready, toast sesame seeds in a dry, heavy skillet over medium heat until they turn brown and smell fragrant. Set them aside in a small bowl.
2. In the same skillet, sauté vegetables in 1 tablespoon oil. Begin with those that take longest to cook. You can also stir-fry them with a small amount of liquid, covered. Do not overcook; vegetables are ready when heated through.
3. Serve the vegetables over rice, sprinkled with sesame seeds and topped with Bragg's Liquid Aminos to taste.
